title: shortcutColumn operation
description: Preliminary column design by the Fenske-Underwood-Gilliland shortcut method. Returns N_min (Fenske), R_min (Underwood), the stage count N (Gilliland) and the feed stage (Kirkbride). Assumes constant relative volatility; not valid for azeotropes.

recoveryLK.title: Light-key recovery to distillate
recoveryLK.description: Fraction of the feed light key leaving in the distillate.

recoveryHK.title: Heavy-key recovery to distillate
recoveryHK.description: Fraction of the feed heavy key leaving in the distillate.

refluxRatio.title: Operating reflux ratio
refluxRatio.description: Operating reflux ratio R; must exceed R_min. Use this or refluxFactor.

refluxFactor.title: Reflux factor R / R_min
refluxFactor.description: Operating reflux as a multiple of the minimum, R/R_min. Use this or refluxRatio.
